game.title.description: Name of the Daily Word game card.

game.description.description: One-line description on the Daily Word game card.

game.playLabel.description: Accessibility label for the Daily Word play button.

result.win.title.description: Heading shown when the player wins.

result.win.share.description: Button label to share the result grid.

result.loss.title.description: Heading shown when the player uses all 6 guesses without winning.

result.loss.answer.description: Shows the correct answer after a loss.
result.loss.answer.notes: {{answer}} is the 5-letter answer word, shown in uppercase.

error.notAWord.description: Toast shown when the guess is not in the word list.

error.tooShort.description: Toast shown when the player taps Enter before typing all letters.

error.couldNotLoad.description: Error banner shown when the puzzle fails to load from the API.

error.couldNotSubmit.description: Toast shown when the guess submission fails due to a network or server error.
